name: The Rising Of the Shield Hero RPG
description:
🛡️ Tate no Yuusha – Open World RPG TRUTH 🛡️

(The Rising of the Shield Hero)

You were summoned along with the 4 Legendary Heroes… but you were NOT meant to be there.

A fifth pillar of light. A broken seal. A “mistake” branded on your hand.

Begins as:

• The accidental fifth hero with a forbidden weapon

• An anomaly hunted by the Church

• A nobody who can rewrite canon

Permanent Death ✓ | Betrayal ✓ | Slavery ✓ | Slow Politics ✓

Canon characters move on their own while you sleep. Every choice matters.

Will you save the world the four heroes are failing… or will you destroy it along with them?

100% True to the Light Novel | No Binary | Pure RPG
creator: Gallicus
